name: Yasopp (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Up to 1 of your Leader gains +1000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.[DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters 1000 power during this turn.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
